message.content:
Read these specific files in d:\intelligent-coding-assistant\backend and report their full content:
1. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/KnowledgeRetrievalService.java
2. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/service/ChatService.java
3. src/main/java/com/coding/assistant/ai/ (all files in this directory)
4. pom.xml (just the dependencies section)
5. src/main/resources/application.yml

Report the full content of each file.
